long_description:
[MON] Sysdig Agents Not Deployed is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_agents_not_deployed.html
TIP Situation: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes
TIP Short Description: Sysdig agents are not deployed on some nodes in in-che-prod01-zone3-edge for the past 24 hours
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-platform-integration:in-che::in-che-prod01-zone3-edge::
IPOPS Enabled: False

Event Generated:

Severity:         Medium
Metric:

Segment:
    agent_tag_cluster = 'in-che-prod01-zone3-edge' and agent_tag_crn_location = 'in-che'

Time:             12/02/2025 09:59 PM UTC
